310.title: Paranormal Survivor
310.description: A woman shares her experience with evil spirits. A couple claims to have been attacked by a demon.

322.title: Paranormal Survivor
322.description: A woman shares her experience with evil spirits. A couple claims to have been attacked by a demon.

335.title: Paranormal Survivor
335.description: A family is terrorised by a supernatural beast that stalks around their trailer.

430.title: Paranormal Survivor
430.description: A woman claims to be tormented by apparitions. The story of a teen being attacked by a demonic beast. Rocky Primiani shares his story of encounters with the afterlife.

442.title: Paranormal Survivor
442.description: A woman claims to be tormented by apparitions. The story of a teen being attacked by a demonic beast. Rocky Primiani shares his story of encounters with the afterlife.

455.title: Paranormal Survivor
455.description: The ghosts of prisoners make jailhouse ghost tours too scary; a woman is attacked by a spirit lurking in her historic home; renovations unleash ghosts protecting a centuries-old secret.

474.title: Paranormal Survivor
474.description: Chris Houston is haunted by an evil ghost boy. A farmhouse is cursed by the presence of dark entities. Something dangerously demonic lurks in Bonnie Shukofksy's home.

486.title: Paranormal Survivor
486.description: Chris Houston is haunted by an evil ghost boy. A farmhouse is cursed by the presence of dark entities. Something dangerously demonic lurks in Bonnie Shukofksy's home.

499.title: Paranormal Survivor
499.description: A woman is horrified to discover restless souls buried in the cemetery next to her house; when a man digs up an old tombstone in his yard, he unwittingly unearths a violent entity.

517.title: Paranormal Survivor
517.description: The story of a woman who is followed by the evil spirit of a bootlegger. Felicia Sills finds a Civil War-era ring.

528.title: Paranormal Survivor
528.description: The story of a woman who is followed by the evil spirit of a bootlegger. Felicia Sills finds a Civil War-era ring.

540.title: Paranormal Survivor
540.description: Crystal Martin and her sister were terrorised for years by ghosts.

558.title: Paranormal Survivor
558.description: A man shares his story of a monster attack. The story of a couple who experienced violent paranormal activity. Holly shares her story of being haunted be her ex-husband's ghost.

569.title: Paranormal Survivor
569.description: A man shares his story of a monster attack. The story of a couple who experienced violent paranormal activity. Holly shares her story of being haunted be her ex-husband's ghost.

599.title: Paranormal Survivor
599.description: Ghosts, poltergeists, demons and their targets star in `Paranormal Survivor.' Hour-long episodes feature people reliving their harrowing encounters with the supernatural. Viewers hear from those who've faced the feared spirits, and dramatic re-creations lure victims back to the scenes of the confrontations.

7068.title: Paranormal Survivor
7068.description: Ghosts, poltergeists, demons and their targets star in `Paranormal Survivor.' Hour-long episodes feature people reliving their harrowing encounters with the supernatural. Viewers hear from those who've faced the feared spirits, and dramatic re-creations lure victims back to the scenes of the confrontations.

7080.title: Paranormal Survivor
7080.description: Teenagers Gaye and her sister summon the dead; Marina Duarte is plagued by paranormal activity after a spirit board session; Lisa discovers that not all the ghosts haunting her childhood home are evil.

7197.title: Paranormal Survivor
7197.description: Julie purchases a farmhouse and claims it's haunted by an evil slave runner. A couple shares their story of a ghost targeting their son; the story of a fixer-upper haunting.

7238.title: Paranormal Survivor
7238.description: Monica shares her experiences being stalked by the Grim Reaper; Brittany shares her experiences of torment. A mother and her two daughters share their experiences with an evil lizard-man.

7279.title: Paranormal Survivor
7279.description: A man explains how his home went from strange to scary. A man explains how he became a beacon for lost spirits. A woman claims to have been violently attacked by a shadowy monster.

7320.title: Paranormal Survivor
7320.description: A couple begins to witness spine-chilling apparitions in their apartment. A young woman has terrifying recurring dreams that tragically come true.
